results.rendered_html:
patita p. p.
1 Fallen, descended, alighted.
2 Dropped.
3 Fallen
(pb) (in a moral sense), abandoned, wicked.
4 A prostate.
5 Degraded, outcast.
6 Fallen in battle, defeated or overthrown.
7 Being in, fallen into; as in avaṃśapatita.
8 Placed, kept;  Pt. 1. 14. 
— taṃ Flying.
Comp.
— utpanna a. sprung from an outcast.
— sāvitrīkaḥ a man of the first three classes whose thread-ceremony has been improperly performed, or not performed at all.
